name: System Prompt
description: Mirrors observed OpenClaw developer instructions into Codex app-server prompt builds and the configured model_instructions_file.

codexHome.description: Codex home directory. Defaults to CODEX_HOME or the OpenClaw default agent's codex-home.

promptFile.description: Generated prompt file path, relative to codexHome unless absolute.

startupDeveloperInstructionsFile.description: Full OpenClaw developer instructions file. Defaults to the bundled openclaw-developer-instructions.md next to this plugin entry.

hookPriority.description: Priority used when this OpenClaw runtime supports api.on options.

debugHook.description: Log bounded before_prompt_build diagnostics without prompt contents.
